disclaimer: Pre-alpha mock signer only — not production MPC. dWallet keys, trust model, and signing protocol are not final.
summary: Fresh DKG -> approve_message -> Presign -> Sign -> on-chain CommitSignature completes end-to-end on devnet via the Polet proxy's progressIkaLifecycle code path (production code, not a one-off script). Scripts/ika-fresh-sign-e2e-v2.ts and scripts/ika-proxy-progression-live-e2e.ts both return signature-committed with matching 64-byte Ed25519 signatures.

rootCause.wrongPreviousConclusion: Claimed upstream mock signer was blocked because DKG produced a dwallet on-chain but no usable key material. This was incorrect.
rootCause.actualIssue: Three unrelated bugs combined to make signing appear impossible: (1) Sign's session_identifier_preimage must match DKG's (the server uses it verbatim as the dwallet key lookup id). Scripts were passing messageDigest / owner.publicKey / zero-but-unsynchronized preimages. (2) Sign's dwallet_attestation must be the real NetworkSignedAttestation from the DKG response (zero bytes cause 'failed to decode'). @ika.xyz/pre-alpha-solana-client@0.1.1 requestSign hardcodes zero attestation — the published helper is unusable for signing. (3) PresignForDWallet is rejected for non-imported-ECDSA keys ('PresignForDWallet is only for imported ECDSA keys'); Curve25519 + EdDSA must use global Presign.

changes: Reuses the existing hand-rolled IkaGrpcClient (proxy/src/lib/ika-grpc-client.ts) to submit BCS-encoded Presign + Sign requests via raw gRPC.
session_identifier_preimage = new Uint8Array(32) (32 zeros, matching the DKG preimage hardcoded in @ika.xyz/pre-alpha-solana-client.requestDKG).
Real NetworkSignedAttestation threaded from input.dwalletAttestation (already persisted in managed fixture).
Global Presign for non-imported keys; PresignForDWallet only when input.importedKey === true.
ApprovalProof.Solana { transaction_signature: bs58-decoded bytes, slot } — toSolanaSignatureBytes now properly bs58-decodes Solana tx signatures.

encodeDWalletRequest: DWalletCurve is a BCS enum with single-byte variant tag (0..3), not a u16 LE scalar. Previous writer.u16Le(curve) produced 1 trailing byte that tripped the server's 'invalid signed_request_data: remaining input' check. Fixed to writer.u8(curve) for dkg, presign, and presign-for-dwallet variants.

v2ScriptEvidence.purpose: Isolated Ika lifecycle (bypasses proxy) to confirm upstream is not blocked.

proxyProductionPathEvidence.purpose: Exercises the refactored progressIkaLifecycle function (production proxy code) against live devnet to prove the fix is in the proxy code path, not just a one-off script.

docsStepMapping.evidence: dwallet PDA live on-chain after CommitDWallet

docsStepMapping.evidence: owner remains authority in smoke tests — path also proven separately via managed fixture (CPI PDA transfer)

docsStepMapping.evidence: MessageApproval PDA at status=Pending visible on-chain

docsStepMapping.label: Network signs (2PC-MPC mock)
docsStepMapping.evidence: 64-byte Ed25519 signature returned from gRPC Sign

docsStepMapping.label: Signature stored on-chain
docsStepMapping.evidence: MessageApproval status=Signed (1), sigLen=64, on-chain bytes byte-for-byte match gRPC Sign response

proxyTestSuite.overall: 210/211 pass (1 unrelated pre-existing DCA test failure)

nextSteps: Wire /intent/multichain/run to call /ika/lifecycle/progress automatically after approve_message lands so the SDK/frontend sees signature-committed status without extra round trips.
Update docs/ika-devnet-smoke-runbook.md Issue-080 section with these explorer URLs + the V2 script reference.
Retire or deprecate scripts/ika-fresh-sign-e2e.ts (v1 with zero-attestation bug) in favour of v2.
